name: Molasses Refrigerator Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg; set aside.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Add eggs, beating well. Blend in molasses and butter/sour milk.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Stir in raisins. Spoon into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about halfway full.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and jam.
NOTE:
Batter can be stored in the refrigerator in a covered container for up to 3 weeks.
